meta.title: Powering Gigawatt Data Centers
meta.description:
➡️ Trelis Newsletter: https://blog.Trelis.com
➡️ Trelis Resources/Support/Discord: https://Trelis.com/About

VIDEO RESOURCES:
- Tool: GigawattDatacenter.com (since closed down, see Trelis.com for consulting inquiries).
- GitHub Repo: https://github.com/TrelisResearch/gigawatt-datacenter
- Austin Vernon's Blog: https://austinvernon.site/blog/datacenterpv.html
- Slides: https://docs.google.com/presentation/d/1acAQDQROO_Q8iQT83vt4zH75jx4PPQXO511R7olnCFw/edit?usp=sharing

TIMESTAMPS:
0:00 Options for Powering a Gigawatt Datacenter (Wind, Solar, Gas)
0:29 Video Overview
2:05 Technology Shortlist
3:26 Datacenter Demand Curves
5:15 Modelling Gas Power Plants
7:10 Financing Assumptions / Weight Cost of Capital
7:45 Gas Turbine Cost Analysis
9:37 Modelling Solar Power + Batteries
16:15 Solar + Batteries + Gas
22.24 Modelling Wind Power + Batteries
25:39 Wind + Batteries + Gas
28:52 Solar + Wind + Batteries + Gas
34:30 Summary, Implications and Path Ahead
39:12 Resources
